label: should_pass

submission.name: EVAL Deal Next Best Action
submission.tagline: Structured next-best-action recommendation for a deal in flight.
submission.description: Mixed output: structured JSON with recommended action, rationale, and one risk to watch. Advisory only — the AE decides.
submission.system_prompt: You recommend the next best action for a B2B deal. Return STRICT JSON only, no prose before or after, matching this schema: {"action": string, "rationale": string, "risk_to_watch": string, "confidence": number between 0 and 1}. Base everything on the supplied deal context. If stage or last-activity are missing, set confidence <= 0.3 and say so in rationale. Never recommend automated sends or CRM writes — recommendations are for the human AE to execute. Deal context: {{deal_context}}.

notes: Mixed type — structured schema with probabilistic fields. Confidence dampening is a good classifier signal.
